name: First Flight: FPV Drone Racing Simulator

reviews.review_title: This game should be taken off the market
reviews.review_description: I was soooooo excited to play a drone game that looked decent. But when I get into the game I get kicked out two times. And when I finally get into the game there is no practice and when I start the race there is no FPV and the description said there would be. ( And as a bonus I get kicked out one more time ) also I could not even get past the first turn on THE ONLY LEVEL. That is why this is the worst game ever. ￼
